title: FinancialDocumentTypeValues
description:
Specifies a type of financial or commercial document. (ISO20022)
https://www.iso20022.org/standardsrepository/type/DocumentTypeCode

x-enumeration-literals.name: MeteredServiceInvoice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an invoice claiming payment for the supply of metered services, for example gas or electricity supplied to a fixed meter.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditNoteRelatedToFinancialAdjustment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a credit note for the final amount settled for a commercial transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DebitNoteRelatedToFinancialAdjustment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a debit note for the final amount settled for a commercial transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CommercialInvoice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an invoice.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditNote
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a credit note.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DebitNote
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a debit note.

x-enumeration-literals.name: HireInvoice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an invoice for the hiring of human resources or renting goods or equipment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SelfBilledInvoice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an invoice issued by the debtor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RemittanceAdviceMessage
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a remittance advice sent separately from the current transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RelatedPaymentInstruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a linked payment instruction to which the current payment instruction is related, for example, in a cover scenario.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CommercialContract
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an agreement between the parties, stipulating the terms and conditions of the delivery of goods or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ForeignExchangeDealReference
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a pre-agreed or pre-arranged foreign exchange transaction to which the payment transaction refers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StatementOfAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a statement of the transactions posted to the debtor's account at the supplier.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DispatchAdvice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a dispatch advice.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PurchaseOrder
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a purchase order.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StructuredCommunicationReference
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a structured communication reference provided by the creditor to identify the referred transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BillOfLading
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a shipping notice.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is an electronic payment document.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AccountReceivableOpenItem
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a payment that applies to a specific source document.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TradeServicesUtilityTransaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document is a transaction identifier as assigned by the Trade Services Utility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashierReceipt
x-enumeration-literals.description: When the Sale system print the Cashier copy of the Payment receipt.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerReceipt
x-enumeration-literals.description: When the Sale System requires   the POI system to print the Customer receipt.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: When the POI or the Sale System wants to store a message on the journal printer or electronic journal of the Sale Terminal (it is sometimes a Sale Logging/Journal Printer).

x-enumeration-literals.name: SaleReceipt
x-enumeration-literals.description: When the Sale System requires the POI system to print the Sale receipt.
